milestones.label: Application Received
milestones.description: Pracharaka application form received and logged in the system.

milestones.label: Eligibility Verified
milestones.description: Applicant's eligibility category confirmed and background review completed.

milestones.label: Certification Fee Paid
milestones.description: SHIVA Pracharaka certification course fee received and receipt issued.

milestones.label: Training Commenced
milestones.description: Pracharaka has begun the SHIVA certification course modules.

milestones.label: Live Sessions Attended
milestones.description: All required live training sessions with Vaidya Satyajith's students completed.

milestones.label: Recorded Modules Completed
milestones.description: All recorded training modules and SHIVA Ayurveda awareness course completed.

milestones.label: Assessment Passed
milestones.description: End-of-course assessment or competency check passed satisfactorily.

milestones.label: SHIVA Certification Issued
milestones.description: Official SHIVA Pracharaka certification issued with a unique certification number.

milestones.label: Pracharaka ID Assigned
milestones.description: Unique Pracharaka ID assigned and recorded in the Ayusurance platform.

milestones.label: Registered on Ayusurance Platform
milestones.description: Pracharaka profile formally created and activated on the Ayusurance operations platform.

milestones.label: Referral Formats Provided
milestones.description: Standard referral templates, checklists, and communication formats handed over to the Pracharaka.

milestones.label: Added to Communication Group
milestones.description: Pracharaka added to the Ayusurance Pracharaka WhatsApp or communication group for ongoing updates.
